    C

    connect_to_database() - Static method in class database_connection
    Opens a JDBC connection to the configured PostgreSQL database.
    createManagerScene(int) - Static method in class manager_gui
    Creates the main manager scene for the given employee.

    D

    database_connection - Class in Unnamed Package
    Utility methods for connecting the GUI layer to the PostgreSQL database and executing SQL files stored in the backend SQL directory.
    database_connection() - Constructor for class database_connection
    default constructor so no warnings show
    database_connection.QueryResult - Class in Unnamed Package
    Immutable container for tabular SQL query results.

    G

    get_Employee_items() - Static method in class manager_gui
    Loads employee names from the database.
    get_Employee_manager_status() - Static method in class manager_gui
    Loads employee manager flags from the database.
    get_inventory_items() - Static method in class manager_gui
    Loads inventory item names from the database.
    get_inventory_items_levels() - Static method in class manager_gui
    Loads current inventory stock levels from the database.
    get_Menu_items() - Static method in class manager_gui
    Loads menu item names from the database.
    get_Menu_prices() - Static method in class manager_gui
    Loads menu item prices from the database.
    getAllMenuNames() - Static method in class gui
    gets all menu names in one array
    getColumns() - Method in class database_connection.QueryResult
    Returns the column labels for the result set.
    getItemName(int) - Static method in class gui
    gets proper item name from row for display
    getRows() - Method in class database_connection.QueryResult
    Returns the query rows.
    getSelectedEmployeeItem() - Static method in class manager_gui
    Returns the currently selected employee name.
    getSelectedInventoryItem() - Static method in class manager_gui
    Returns the currently selected inventory item name.
    getSelectedMenuItem() - Static method in class manager_gui
    Returns the currently selected menu item name.
    gui - Class in Unnamed Package
    Constructs the GUI application.
    gui() - Constructor for class gui
     

    M

    main(String[]) - Static method in class database_connection
    Runs a simple connectivity and query execution example from the command line.
    main(String[]) - Static method in class gui
    The main function, which launches the gui
    manager_gui - Class in Unnamed Package
    Builds the manager-facing JavaFX screens and helper workflows used to manage inventory, menu items, employees, and reports.
    manager_gui() - Constructor for class manager_gui
     

    Q

    QueryResult(List, List) - Constructor for class database_connection.QueryResult
    Creates a query result wrapper.

    R

    runNamedSqlFromBackendFolder(Connection, String, List) - Static method in class database_connection
    Loads and executes a named SQL file from the backend sql folder.
    runSqlFile(Connection, Path, List) - Static method in class database_connection
    Executes the SQL contained in a file using the provided JDBC connection.

    S

    start(Stage) - Method in class gui
    Most of our inital button placement lies here

    T

    toString() - Method in class database_connection.QueryResult
    Returns a string representation of the query result.
